change_log.file: src/game/phase_transitions.h, src/game/phase_transitions.c, src/game/turn_flow.h, src/game/turn_flow.c, src/game/pass_phase.h, src/game/pass_phase.c, src/net/state_recv.c, src/main.c
change_log.change: Step 10: Online-aware flow control. Added 'bool online' parameter to three critical update functions: phase_transition_update(), flow_update(), pass_subphase_update(). Headers guard online-specific behavior (AI plays, trick resolution, timeouts skip in online mode when animations are buffered). state_recv.c now buffers pass_staged[] animations during PHASE_PASSING to prevent state overwrites. main.c passes client_net_state (online flag) to all three functions.
impact: src/main.c (now passes online flag to three functions)
src/net/state_recv.c (now depends on render/anim.h for animation buffering)

change_log.change: Step 7: Client Connection Manager. client_net.h: ClientNetState enum (DISCONNECTED, CONNECTING, HANDSHAKING, CONNECTED, ERROR), 12 public functions for lifecycle (init/shutdown), connection (connect/disconnect), per-frame update, query (state/seat/has_new_state/consume_state/ping_ms/reject_reason), and command sending (send_cmd). client_net.c: File-scope statics (NetSocket with max_conns=1, conn_id, state, seat, room_code, NetPlayerView storage, ping tracking). Implements connect→handshake→connected state machine, message dispatch loop (HANDSHAKE_ACK/REJECT, STATE_UPDATE, PONG, ERROR, DISCONNECT), periodic ping with CLOCK_MONOTONIC timestamps, InputCmd filtering and forwarding via net_input_cmd_is_relevant/from_local. main.c: Added client_net_init() after input_init(), client_net_update(clk.raw_dt) before process_input(), client_net_shutdown() before CloseWindow().

Step 5: Server Room Management. room.h: Room struct (embeds ServerGame, PlayerSlot[4], room code, status), PlayerSlot struct (conn_id, auth_token stub, SlotStatus), ConnSlotInfo (for NetConn.user_data mapping), RoomStatus/SlotStatus enums, 12-function room management API. room.c: Static g_rooms[MAX_ROOMS] array, room code generation (4-char, ambiguity-safe alphabet), room_join auto-starts game when 4 connected, room_leave handles WAITING/PLAYING/FINISHED states, room_tick_all ticks all PLAYING rooms then destroys FINISHED rooms.
impact: Future: src/server/server_main.c (will call room_manager_init and room_tick_all)

change_log.change: New non-blocking TCP socket layer with ring buffers and poll()-based multiplexing. (1) socket.h: Defines NetRingBuf struct (16KB capacity, monotonic head/tail for wrap-around), NetConnState enum (DISCONNECTED, CONNECTING, CONNECTED, CLOSING), NetDisconnectCause enum (NONE, CLOSED_LOCAL, CLOSED_REMOTE, ERROR), NetConn struct (fd, state, cause, send/recv ring buffers, remote_addr, user_data for server mapping), NetSocket struct (dynamic conns array, pollfds for poll(), listen_fd for server). Exports 18 functions: lifecycle (net_socket_init/shutdown), server (net_socket_listen/accept), client (net_socket_connect), per-frame update (net_socket_update with poll loop), send/recv (net_socket_send/recv/recv_consume), connection mgmt (net_socket_close/state/count), protocol integration (net_socket_send_msg/recv_msg wrapping NetMsg serialization). Depends on protocol.h for NetMsg types and framing constants. (2) socket.c: Implements all public functions plus internal helpers (set_nonblocking, format_addr, conn_reset, conn_close_fd, find_free_slot, handle_connect_complete, handle_recv, handle_send). Ring buffer ops are static inline helpers (ringbuf_init, ringbuf_read_avail, ringbuf_write_space, ringbuf_write, ringbuf_read, ringbuf_peek, ringbuf_consume). net_socket_update() manages single poll() call per frame covering all connections + listener (index 0), handles POLLIN/POLLOUT/POLLERR/POLLHUP events with state-specific handlers (CONNECTING → completion check, CONNECTED → recv+send, CLOSING → send then shutdown). Protocol integration functions net_socket_send_msg/recv_msg serialize/deserialize via protocol.h helpers.
impact: src/net/protocol.h (already listed socket.c as used_by, now matched with entry)
Future: src/net/client_net.c (will use for client->server connection)
Future: src/net/server_net.c (will use for listener + accept loop)
Future: src/net/lobby_net.c (will use for lobby server connection management)

change_log.change: New network protocol module. (1) protocol.h: Defines wire-format types (NetCard, NetMsg, NetMsgType enum with 64 message types for handshake/connection/game/lobby/server messages), message payloads (14 distinct payload structs), framing (net_frame_write/read with length prefix), serialization (net_msg_serialize/deserialize), filtering (net_input_cmd_is_relevant), and anti-cheat player view builder (net_build_player_view with full Phase2 state projection, transmutation/contract/draft/effect snapshots). Forward declares GameState and Phase2State to avoid pulling game headers. (2) protocol.c: Implements all serialization/deserialization logic with byte-packing helpers (write_u8-write_f32, read_* variants), per-message type serialization (~1600 LOC), and net_build_player_view() which filters and projects full game state into per-player views with hidden information masked. Added @deps-requires: game_state.h, phase2_state.h, string.h. Makefile: Added src/net/*.c wildcard to build.
impact: src/net/server_game.c (calls net_build_player_view per player per tick)

(6) turn_flow.c: Added post-reveal announcement in FLOW_FOG_REVEAL, added fogged/fog_transmuter to TTI reset. (7) phase_transitions.c: Added fogged/fog_transmuter to TTI reset. (8) pass_phase.c: Added fogged/fog_transmuter to both SavedTransmute structs for save/restore during card passing.

change_log.file: src/phase2/transmutation.h, src/phase2/phase2_state.h, src/phase2/transmutation_logic.h, src/phase2/transmutation_logic.c, src/phase2/json_parse.c, src/phase2/contract_logic.c, src/game/play_phase.c, src/game/info_sync.c, src/game/turn_flow.c, src/game/update.c, src/main.c
change_log.change: Mirror transmutation (ID 9): (1) transmutation.h: Added TEFFECT_MIRROR enum, resolved_effects[] to TrickTransmuteInfo. (2) phase2_state.h: Added last_played_transmute_id/last_played_resolved_effect to Phase2State for game-scoped Mirror history. (3) transmutation_logic.h/c: Added transmute_resolve_effect(), transmute_is_effective_fog(), transmute_effect_name(); updated transmute_on_trick_complete() to use resolved_effects[] instead of td->effect. (4) json_parse.c: Added MIRROR_COPY_EFFECTS mapping. (5) contract_logic.c: Init Mirror history in contract_state_init(). (6) play_phase.c: Resolve effect at play time, update global history, Mirror chat log. (7) info_sync.c: Use transmute_is_effective_fog() and resolved_effects[] for fog detection. (8) turn_flow.c/update.c/main.c: Init resolved_effects[] in TTI reset sites.

change_log.file: src/render/anim.h, src/render/render.h, src/game/turn_flow.h, src/game/ai.h, src/game/ai.c, src/game/turn_flow.c, src/render/render.c
change_log.change: Animation and duel flow infrastructure additions: (1) src/render/anim.h: Added ANIM_EFFECT_FLIGHT_DURATION (0.35f) and ANIM_DUEL_EXCHANGE_DURATION (0.40f) constants for Rogue/Duel card animations. (2) src/render/render.h: Added opponent_hover_active (bool) field to RenderState struct for tracking opponent card hover state during duel selection. (3) src/game/turn_flow.h: Added 5 new FlowStep enum values (FLOW_ROGUE_ANIM_TO_CENTER, FLOW_ROGUE_ANIM_BACK, FLOW_DUEL_ANIM_TO_CENTER, FLOW_DUEL_ANIM_EXCHANGE, FLOW_DUEL_ANIM_RETURN) for card animation phases. Added 4 new TurnFlow fields: rogue_staged_cv_idx (card visual at center), duel_staged_cv_idx (opponent's card at center), duel_own_cv_idx (winner's card being swapped), duel_ai_decided (true if AI pre-decided targets). (4) src/game/ai.h: Added ai_duel_choose(GameState, int winner, int *out_target_player, int *out_target_idx, int *out_own_idx) declaration for AI duel decision logic (no state mutation). (5) src/game/ai.c: Implemented ai_duel_choose() to select random opponent and random cards from both hands. (6) src/game/turn_flow.c: Added helper try_start_duel() to initiate duel flow, sets opponent_hover_active, calls ai_duel_choose for AI players. Now uses ANIM_EFFECT_FLIGHT_DURATION, ANIM_DUEL_EXCHANGE_DURATION, and layout_board_center() for card animations. try_start_duel takes GameSettings* parameter. (7) src/render/render.c: Uses opponent_hover_active field from RenderState (no behavior change in current implementation, flag available for UI features).
impact: src/game/turn_flow.c (uses all new constants, FlowStep values, TurnFlow fields, calls ai_duel_choose)

change_log.change: Added transmute_effect_affects_score() function to transmutation_logic: takes transmutation_id and returns true if the effect modifies scoring (checks for TEFFECT_WOTT_DUPLICATE_ROUND_POINTS, TEFFECT_WOTT_REDUCE_SCORE_3, TEFFECT_WOTT_REDUCE_SCORE_1). phase_transitions.c now calls transmute_effect_affects_score(pv->transmute_id) in scoring phase to determine which cards should animate (line 63). turn_flow.c copies transmutation_id into pile cards via pv->transmute_id = pps->current_tti.transmutation_ids[i] (line 197).
impact: src/game/phase_transitions.c (uses transmute_effect_affects_score for scoring card classification)
Assets: Transmutation definitions with score-affecting effects will now properly animate in scoring phase

change_log.change: Added new public function game_state_complete_trick_with(GameState *gs, int winner, int points) to allow Phase 2 transmutation logic to override trick winner and points. Existing game_state_complete_trick() now delegates to it, preserving backward compatibility.
impact: src/game/turn_flow.c (calls game_state_complete_trick_with in p2 path for transmutation overrides)

change_log.file: src/phase2/transmutation.h, src/phase2/json_parse.c, src/phase2/transmutation_logic.c, src/phase2/transmutation_logic.h, src/render/anim.h, src/render/render.c, src/game/turn_flow.h, src/game/turn_flow.c, src/core/input.h, src/game/process_input.c, src/game/update.c, src/game/ai.h, src/game/ai.c
change_log.change: Duel transmutation effect (TEFFECT_WOTT_SWAP_CARD): (1) src/phase2/transmutation.h: Added TEFFECT_WOTT_SWAP_CARD to TransmuteEffect enum (line 29). Added int duel_pending_winner field to TransmuteRoundState struct (line 99). (2) src/phase2/json_parse.c: Added WOTT_SWAP_CARD entry to TRANSMUTE_EFFECT_MAP. (3) src/phase2/transmutation_logic.c: In transmute_on_trick_complete(), detect TEFFECT_WOTT_SWAP_CARD and set duel_pending_winner=winner. Added transmute_swap_between_players(GameState *gs, Phase2State *p2, int pa, int idx_a, int pb, int idx_b) function to swap cards between two players' hands. (4) src/phase2/transmutation_logic.h: Added transmute_swap_between_players() declaration and GameState forward decl. (5) src/render/anim.h: Added 'uint8_t revealed_to' field to CardVisual struct (bitmask for per-player visibility). Added stdint.h include. (6) src/render/render.c: Modified face_up check to include revealed_to bitmask: 'bool visible = cv->face_up || (cv->revealed_to & 1)' (line 1226). (7) src/game/turn_flow.h: Added FLOW_DUEL_PICK_OPPONENT, FLOW_DUEL_PICK_OWN to FlowStep enum (lines 31-32). Added duel_winner, duel_target_player, duel_target_card_idx, duel_own_card_idx, duel_returned fields to TurnFlow struct (lines 46-50). Added FLOW_DUEL_CHOOSE_TIME constant (10.0f, line 62). (8) src/game/turn_flow.c: Added try_start_duel() helper function (lines 31-54). Initialize duel fields to -1 in flow_init(). In flow_update(), after rogue reveal completes, check for pending duel via try_start_duel(). Added FLOW_DUEL_PICK_OPPONENT case (lines 408-435): hit-test opponent cards, on valid pick transition to FLOW_DUEL_PICK_OWN, reveal cards via revealed_to bitmask. Added FLOW_DUEL_PICK_OWN case (lines 436-501): handle duel_returned flag (cancel swap), duel_own_card_idx selection (confirm swap and call transmute_swap_between_players), or timeout. Clear revealed_to bitmask after each outcome. For AI player in FLOW_DUEL_PICK_OPPONENT state, call ai_duel_execute(). (9) src/core/input.h: Added INPUT_CMD_DUEL_PICK, INPUT_CMD_DUEL_GIVE, INPUT_CMD_DUEL_RETURN to InputCmdType enum (lines 64-66). Added duel_pick union member (target_player, hand_index) and duel_give union member (hand_index) (lines 106, 109). (10) src/game/process_input.c: Added input handling for FLOW_DUEL_PICK_OPPONENT state: hit-test opponent cards, push INPUT_CMD_DUEL_PICK (lines 273-295). Added input handling for FLOW_DUEL_PICK_OWN state: hit-test own hand cards, push INPUT_CMD_DUEL_GIVE or INPUT_CMD_DUEL_RETURN on right-click (lines 298-317). (11) src/game/update.c: Added handler for INPUT_CMD_DUEL_PICK: validate target player and card, set flow->duel_target_player/duel_target_card_idx (lines 231-238). Added handler for INPUT_CMD_DUEL_GIVE: set flow->duel_own_card_idx (lines 240-243). Added handler for INPUT_CMD_DUEL_RETURN: set flow->duel_returned=true (lines 246-247). (12) src/game/ai.h: Added ai_duel_execute(GameState *gs, Phase2State *p2, RenderState *rs, int winner) declaration (lines 33-34). (13) src/game/ai.c: Implemented ai_duel_execute(): picks random opponent and random cards from both hands, calls transmute_swap_between_players(), pushes chat message.
impact: src/game/turn_flow.c (central orchestrator of duel flow states, calls ai_duel_execute, uses transmute_swap_between_players, manages revealed_to bitmask)
src/game/update.c (handles duel input commands, updates flow state)
src/game/process_input.c (hit-tests opponent cards for duel selection)
src/render/render.c (shows cards based on revealed_to bitmask)

change_log.file: src/phase2/transmutation.h, src/phase2/phase2_state.h, src/phase2/transmutation_logic.h, src/phase2/json_parse.c, src/game/turn_flow.c, src/phase2/contract_logic.c
change_log.change: Martyr transmutation effect implementation: (1) src/phase2/transmutation.h: Added TransmuteEffect enum (TEFFECT_NONE, TEFFECT_WOTT_DUPLICATE_ROUND_POINTS) and TransmutationDef.effect field. Added TransmuteRoundState struct with martyr_flags[NUM_PLAYERS]. (2) src/phase2/phase2_state.h: Added RoundPhase2.transmute_round field. (3) src/phase2/transmutation_logic.h: Exported 3 new functions: transmute_round_state_init(), transmute_on_trick_complete(Phase2State, Trick, winner, TrickTransmuteInfo), transmute_apply_round_end(Phase2State, round_points[], total_scores[]). Added forward decl of Phase2State. (4) src/phase2/json_parse.c: Added TRANSMUTE_EFFECT_MAP table with TEFFECT_* mappings, parses 'effect' field in transmutation loader. (5) src/game/turn_flow.c: Calls transmute_on_trick_complete() after trick winner determined, calls transmute_apply_round_end() at round end (FLOW_TRICK_COLLECTING). change_log.change: Contract tracking expansion: (1) src/phase2/contract.h: Added 17 new ConditionType enum values (COND_WIN_CONSECUTIVE_TRICKS, COND_HIT_N_WITH_SUIT, COND_LOWEST_SCORE, COND_NEVER_LEAD_SUIT, COND_WIN_TRICK_N, COND_BREAK_HEARTS, COND_WIN_FIRST_N_TRICKS, COND_AVOID_LAST_N_TRICKS, COND_WIN_WITH_PASSED_CARD, COND_HIT_WITH_PASSED_CARD, COND_WIN_FIRST_AND_LAST, COND_LEAD_QUEEN_SPADES_TRICK, COND_SHOOT_THE_MOON, COND_PREVENT_MOON, COND_PLAY_CARD_FIRST_OF_SUIT, COND_HIT_WITH_TRANSMUTE), removed COND_WIN_LAST_TRICK. Added stdint.h include and #include core/game_state.h for PASS_CARD_COUNT. ConditionParam struct extended with trick_num field. ContractInstance struct expanded with 11 new tracking fields (tricks_won_mask, current_streak, max_streak, led_with_suit[], broke_hearts, led_qs_trick, played_card_first_of_suit, received_in_pass[], num_received, won_with_passed_card, hit_with_passed_card, hits_dealt[], prevented_moon, hit_with_transmute). (2) src/phase2/contract_logic.h: Signature change to contract_on_trick_complete() (added trick_number, tti, hearts_broken_before params). New function contract_record_received_cards() exported. (3) src/phase2/phase2_state.h: Added suit_seen[SUIT_COUNT] field to RoundPhase2. (4) src/game/turn_flow.h: Added hearts_broken_at_trick_start field to TurnFlow struct.
impact: src/phase2/contract_logic.c (17 new case handlers in contract_evaluate, rewritten contract_on_trick_complete, new contract_record_received_cards function)
src/game/turn_flow.c (saves hearts_broken state, calls contract_on_trick_complete with new signature, initializes hearts_broken_at_trick_start)
src/game/pass_phase.c (calls contract_record_received_cards in 2 locations: finalize_card_pass and pass_start_receive_anim)
src/phase2/json_parse.c (updated CONDITION_TYPE_MAP with 17 new entries, added trick_num parsing)

change_log.file: src/core/input.h, src/render/render.h, src/render/render.c, src/game/process_input.c, src/game/update.c, src/main.c
change_log.change: In-game pause menu: Added INPUT_CMD_RETURN_TO_MENU to InputCmdType enum. Added PauseState enum (PAUSE_INACTIVE, PAUSE_MENU, PAUSE_CONFIRM_MENU, PAUSE_CONFIRM_QUIT) and PAUSE_BTN_COUNT=4 to render.h. Added is_ingame_phase() static inline function in render.h to test if phase is in {PHASE_PASSING, PHASE_DEALING, PHASE_PLAYING, PHASE_SCORING}. Added pause_state, pause_btns[4], pause_confirm_yes, pause_confirm_no, settings_return_phase (GamePhase), settings_return_paused (bool) fields to RenderState. render.c uses these fields for pause menu drawing and layout. process_input.c handles pause button clicks and confirmation dialogs, dispatches INPUT_CMD_RETURN_TO_MENU. update.c intercepts INPUT_CMD_CANCEL to open pause menu during in-game phases, dispatches return-to-menu and settings commands while paused.

Added FLOW_FOG_REVEAL enum value between FLOW_TRICK_DISPLAY and FLOW_TRICK_PILE_ANIM. Added FLOW_FOG_REVEAL_TIME (2.0f) and FLOW_FOG_DISSOLVE_TIME (0.5f) constants. Extracted trick_to_pile_transition() static helper. Fog cards now stay visible during FLOW_TRICK_DISPLAY and dissolve during FLOW_FOG_REVEAL before pile animation.

Settings tabs UI: Added SettingsTab enum (DISPLAY, GAMEPLAY, AUDIO), SETTINGS_TAB_COUNT, settings_tab and settings_tab_btns[3] fields to RenderState. sync_layout() creates tab bar and filters visible rows by active tab. draw_phase_settings() draws tab bar with active highlight, removed section headers. process_input.c hit-tests tab buttons. update.c initializes settings_tab on settings open.

change_log.file: src/game/ai.h, src/game/ai.c, src/render/card_dimens.h, src/core/settings.h/c, src/audio/audio.h/c, src/render/layout.c, src/render/card_render.c, src/render/render.h, src/main.c
change_log.change: Major architectural refactoring: (1) Moved src/core/ai.h→src/game/ai.h and src/core/ai.c→src/game/ai.c. Include paths updated in ai.h, main.c, turn_flow.c, pass_phase.c. (2) Created src/render/card_dimens.h exporting CARD_WIDTH_REF, CARD_HEIGHT_REF, CARD_OVERLAP_REF, CARD_SELECT_LIFT_REF (extracted from render.h). render.h now includes card_dimens.h. layout.c and card_render.c now include card_dimens.h instead of render.h to avoid circular deps. (3) audio/audio.c no longer includes render/anim.h—audio_update(AudioState*,float dt,float anim_speed) now takes anim_speed as parameter. main.c passes anim_get_speed() when calling audio_update(). (4) core/settings.h/c no longer depends on render/layout.h—settings_apply() no longer takes LayoutConfig* param. Callers (main.c, settings_ui.c) now call layout_recalculate() themselves after settings_apply(). (5) Makefile has new 'debug' target with -DDEBUG flag. main.c wraps debug code with #ifdef DEBUG.

Hand rearranging feature: hand_move_card() exported from hand.h (moves card from src_index to dst_index, shifting intermediate cards). DragState struct extended with hand_slot_origin, hand_slot_current, is_play_drag, rearrange_map[], rearrange_count for rearranging state tracking. Added ANIM_REARRANGE_BLEND_RATE macro (12.0f) to anim.h for smooth visual feedback. process_input.c now uses hand_move_card() via commit_hand_reorder() when user completes a drag without playing.

Added contract reveal animation fields: RenderState.contract_reveal_count (int, 0..NUM_PLAYERS), RenderState.contract_reveal_timer (float, countdown). Added ANIM_CONTRACT_REVEAL_STAGGER macro (0.4s) to anim.h. Used in update.c PHASE_SCORING.SCORE_SUB_DONE case to initialize staggered contract panel reveal; in render.c for timed reveal animation.

change_log.file: src/render/render.h, src/render/anim.h, src/render/layout.h/c, src/render/render.c, src/game/update.c, src/main.c
change_log.change: Scoring animation expansion: ScoringSubphase enum extended with 3 new values (SCORE_SUB_WIPE_TO_CONTRACTS, SCORE_SUB_CONTRACTS, SCORE_SUB_WIPE_OUT). RenderState expanded with: score_wipe_progress (0→1 diagonal wipe), score_contracts_rt (RenderTexture2D for contracts panel), score_contracts_rt_loaded (validity flag), score_advance_pending (wipe completion flag). layout.h/c added layout_wipe_boundary_x() function for diagonal wipe math. render.c added 3 static functions: draw_wipe_polygon() (renders diagonal mask), draw_contracts_panel() (renders contract results), draw_scoring_table() (renders scoring grid). Added ANIM_SCORING_WIPE_DURATION (0.5s) macro to anim.h. update.c handlers for new ScoringSubphase values (transitions and contract panel logic). main.c consumes score_advance_pending flag: resets render textures, calls game_state_advance_scoring(), syncs prev_round_points to Phase2State.

Scoring animation infrastructure: Added ANIM_SCORING_* timing macros to anim.h (FLY_DURATION, PLAYER_STAGGER, CARD_STAGGER, MENU_DELAY, MENU_DURATION, COUNTUP_RATE). Added ScoringSubphase enum to render.h with states (SCORE_SUB_CARDS_FLY, SCORE_SUB_DISPLAY, SCORE_SUB_COUNT_UP, SCORE_SUB_DONE). Added scoring animation fields to RenderState: score_subphase, score_anim_timer, score_menu_slide_y, score_cards_landed, score_menu_arrived, score_countup_round[], score_countup_timer, score_tick_pending. Added layout_scoring_row_y() and layout_scoring_card_position() functions to layout.h/c. Added SFX_SCORE_TICK (SFX_CARD_DEAL, SFX_HEARTS_BROKEN renamed in enum) to audio.h/c with asset path. Added pile_owner field to CardVisual struct in anim.h.

Trick pile animation feature: Added ANIM_PILE_COLLECT_DURATION (0.35s) and ANIM_PILE_STAGGER (0.06s) macros to anim.h. Added layout_pile_position() function to layout.h/c. Added pile_cards[], pile_card_count, pile_anim_in_progress to RenderState struct; added render_clear_piles() function to render.h/c. Added FLOW_TRICK_PILE_ANIM enum value and FLOW_PILE_ANIM_TIME (0.4s) constant to turn_flow.h. Implemented pile collect animation logic in turn_flow.c (FLOW_TRICK_DISPLAY case: copy trick visuals to pile_cards[], animate to pile_position). New FLOW_TRICK_PILE_ANIM case manages animation timing. turn_flow.c now includes layout.h, render/anim.h, stdlib.h. phase_transitions.c calls render_clear_piles() when entering PHASE_DEALING and PHASE_PLAYING.
impact: src/game/turn_flow.c (uses layout_pile_position, ANIM_PILE_COLLECT_DURATION, ANIM_PILE_STAGGER, pile animation fields)

change_log.change: Created audio subsystem with AudioState struct, MusicContext enum (MUSIC_MENU, MUSIC_GAME), SfxId enum (SFX_CARD_PLAY, SFX_HEARTS_BROKEN, SFX_TRANSMUTE), and 6 functions (audio_init, audio_shutdown, audio_update, audio_set_music, audio_play_sfx, audio_apply_settings). Music crossfade with FADE_DURATION=1.0s. Requires raylib.h and core/settings.h.
impact: src/main.c (new audio initialization, update, shutdown; sets music per phase; triggers SFX on events)

change_log.change: Added two new bool fields to PlayPhaseState: card_played_sfx and transmute_sfx. Set in play_card_with_transmute() when card is successfully played (card_played_sfx always true, transmute_sfx true if card was transmuted).
impact: src/main.c (consumes these flags in main loop to trigger audio_play_sfx calls)

change_log.change: Added SETTINGS_ACTIVE_COUNT to exports (value changed from 5 to 8 to accommodate audio volume rows). Constant is used in render.c to disable inactive settings rows.
impact: src/render/render.c (line 413: uses SETTINGS_ACTIVE_COUNT to gate settings_disabled array)
src/game/settings_ui.c (functionally; now supports 8 settings instead of 5)

change_log.change: Audio volume setting rows (master_volume, music_volume, sfx_volume) now functional in cases 5, 6, 7 of setting_adjust(). Previously disabled stubs.
impact: User can now adjust audio volumes in settings menu

change_log.change: Added src/audio/*.c to compile rules (builds src/audio/audio.c).
impact: Build system now compiles audio module

change_log.change: Added anim_set_speed(float multiplier) and anim_get_speed() functions for global animation speed control
impact: src/render/render.c (uses anim_get_speed for deal card stagger)

change_log.change: Added card passing toss animation: 3 new PassSubphase values (TOSS_ANIM, TOSS_WAIT, RECEIVE), anim_setup_toss() extracted to anim.h/c, layout_pass_staging_position() in layout.h/c, PassStagedCard + staging fields in render.h, render_alloc_card_visual() exposed, 4 new functions in pass_phase.h/c (pass_start_toss_anim, pass_toss_animations_done, pass_start_receive_anim, pass_receive_animations_done). game_state_execute_pass() no longer sets PHASE_PLAYING (caller owns transition). MAX_CARD_VISUALS bumped to 80.
Extracted easing functions from anim.h (formerly anim.h — old file renamed). Contains EaseType enum and ease_apply(), lerpf() functions. Leaf module with no dependencies.

Renamed from old anim.h. Extracts CardVisual struct and animation API (anim_start, anim_update, anim_toss_enabled) with all animation timing constants (ANIM_*_DURATION, TOSS_*, HOVER_*). Now depends on easing.h for EaseType.
impact: src/game/phase_transitions.c (uses anim.h for particle burst timing)

change_log.change: New module: GameClock struct with raw_dt, dt, accumulator, total_time, time_scale, paused. FIXED_DT=1/60, MAX_FRAME_DT=0.25, MAX_CATCHUP=5. Functions: clock_init(), clock_update().
impact: src/main.c (uses GameClock for frame timing and fixed-timestep loop)

change_log.change: New module: ai_select_pass(GameState, int player_id) and ai_play_card(GameState, RenderState, Phase2State, PlayPhaseState, int player_id). Extracted from main.c. Requires PlayPhaseState.
New module: PlayPhaseState struct (pending_transmutation, current_tti), play_card_with_transmute(), p2_player_name(). Extracted from main.c.

New module: PassPhaseState struct, 4 time constants (PASS_VENDETTA_TIME, PASS_CONTRACT_TIME, PASS_CARD_PASS_TIME, PASS_AI_VENDETTA_DISPLAY), 7 functions (advance_pass_subphase, auto_select_human_pass, finalize_card_pass, pass_subphase_update, setup_contract_ui, setup_vendetta_ui, pass_subphase_time_limit). Extracted from main.c.

New module: FlowStep enum (FLOW_IDLE through FLOW_BETWEEN_TRICKS), TurnFlow struct (step, timer, turn_timer, animating_player, prev_trick_count), 6 timing constants (FLOW_*_TIME). Functions: flow_init(), flow_update(). Extracted from main.c.
New module: process_input(GameState, RenderState, PassPhaseState, PlayPhaseState, Phase2State, FlowStep). Handles mouse/keyboard input dispatch. Extracted from main.c.
New module: game_update(GameState, RenderState, Phase2State, PassPhaseState, PlayPhaseState, SettingsUIState, GameSettings, dt, quit_requested ptr). Main game logic loop. Extracted from main.c.
New module: SettingsUIState struct (pending_display, is_pending), sync_settings_values(), setting_adjust(), apply_display_settings(). Handles settings UI state. Extracted from main.c.

New module: info_sync_update(GameState, RenderState, Phase2State, PlayPhaseState) syncs contract/vendetta/bonus/transmutation info panel display, info_sync_playability(GameState, RenderState, Phase2State) computes transmute-aware card playability. Extracted from main.c.

New module: phase_transition_update() handles phase entry/exit logic and chat messages (call before render_update), phase_transition_post_render() spawns particle burst on hearts break (call after render_update). Extracted from main.c.
impact: src/main.c (calls both functions in correct render order)

change_log.change: Added TEFFECT_BOUNTY_REDIRECT_QOS enum value — Bounty transmutation redirects Q♠ points to the player who played Q♠, not the trick winner. Per-card pile routing in turn_flow.c.
impact: src/phase2/transmutation_logic.c (added Bounty to transmute_effect_affects_score and transmute_effect_name)
src/game/turn_flow.c (Bounty point splitting in FLOW_TRICK_COLLECTING, per-card pile routing in trick_to_pile_transition)

change_log.change: Added TEFFECT_JOKER_LEAD_WIN transmutation effect: (1) transmutation.h: Added enum value at line 37 — Joker card wins trick when leading (absolute priority, beats ALWAYS_WIN), loses when not leading (treated as ALWAYS_LOSE). Updated @deps-exports enum description. (2) json_parse.c: Added mapping entry {"JOKER_LEAD_WIN", TEFFECT_JOKER_LEAD_WIN} at line 107 to TRANSMUTE_EFFECT_MAP[]. Updated @deps-requires. (3) transmutation_logic.c: Modified transmute_trick_get_winner() function: added TEFFECT_JOKER_LEAD_WIN to special effect check (line 242), added leading Joker absolute priority path at lines 277-279 (returns lead player unconditionally), added non-leading Joker ALWAYS_LOSE exclusion in Binding check at line 304, added non-leading Joker exclusion in Crown highest rank resolution at line 332, added non-leading Joker exclusion in normal suit-following resolution at line 356. Added case for TEFFECT_JOKER_LEAD_WIN to transmute_effect_name() at line 635 (returns "Joker"). Updated @deps-requires. (4) assets/defs/transmutations.json: Updated ID 21 effect field from EFFECT_NONE to JOKER_LEAD_WIN.
impact: src/phase2/json_parse.c (added enum mapping for JSON parsing)
src/phase2/transmutation_logic.c (heavy modification to transmute_trick_get_winner for leading/non-leading Joker logic, added effect name)
Potential impact: Any file calling transmute_trick_get_winner() must handle new trick resolution priority. Files already checked: turn_flow.c (safe — uses function result unchanged)

change_log.change: Added auto-sort feature for received pass cards: (1) game_state.h: Added PASS_SUB_REVEAL enum value to PassSubphase; added bool skip_human_pass_sort field to GameState (suppresses hand sort after receiving pass). (2) settings.h: Added bool auto_sort_received field to GameSettings (player preference for auto-sorting received cards). (3) pass_phase.h: Added PASS_REVEAL_DURATION constant (2.0f), forward decl GameSettings, changed signatures: pass_start_receive_anim() and pass_subphase_update() now take const GameSettings *settings parameter. (4) pass_phase.c: Added #include core/settings.h, new static function pass_start_reveal() for PASS_SUB_REVEAL subphase logic. (5) render.h: Increased SETTINGS_ROW_COUNT and SETTINGS_ACTIVE_COUNT from 8 to 9 (for auto_sort_received toggle row 5). (6) settings_ui.c: Updated sync_settings_values() and setting_adjust() to handle new row 5 (auto_sort_received toggle), shifted volume rows to 6,7,8. (7) main.c: Updated call to pass_subphase_update() to pass &g_settings argument.
impact: src/render/render.c (uses new SETTINGS_ROW_COUNT/ACTIVE_COUNT for settings UI arrays)

change_log.file: src/core/input_cmd.h (new file), src/core/input_cmd.c (new file), src/core/input.h, src/core/input.c, src/core/deck.c, src/phase2/contract_logic.c, src/phase2/transmutation_logic.c, src/phase2/phase2_defs.c, src/phase2/json_parse.c, src/net/protocol.h (new file), src/net/protocol.c (new file), src/server/server_main.c (new file), src/lobby/lobby_main.c (new file)
change_log.change: Step 3: Structural changes for multi-binary build (client, server, lobby). (1) src/core/input_cmd.h: NEW — Raylib-free command types, queue struct, and queue API (push/pop/clear). Exports InputCmdType, InputCmd, InputCmdQueue, INPUT_CMD_QUEUE_CAPACITY, and queue functions. (2) src/core/input_cmd.c: NEW — Command queue ring-buffer implementation. (3) src/core/input.h: Split command types → input_cmd.h (includes it). Now exports only InputAction, InputState, input_init/poll/get_state(). (4) src/core/input.c: Removed queue code (moved to input_cmd.c). Kept polling logic, calls input_cmd_push via input.h include. (5) src/core/deck.c: Removed raylib.h, replaced GetRandomValue with stdlib rand(). (6) src/phase2/contract_logic.c: Removed raylib.h, replaced GetRandomValue with rand(). (7) src/phase2/transmutation_logic.c: Removed raylib.h, replaced GetRandomValue with rand(). (8) src/phase2/phase2_defs.c: Removed raylib.h, replaced TraceLog with fprintf. (9) src/phase2/json_parse.c: Removed raylib.h LoadFileText/UnloadFileText, replaced with standard C fopen/fread/fclose. (10) src/net/protocol.h: NEW — Network protocol, message types, serialization, player view building. Raylib-free (uses core/card.h and input_cmd.h only). (11) src/net/protocol.c: Protocol implementation (serialization, framing, player view). (12) src/server/server_main.c: NEW — Server entry point (stub). (13) src/lobby/lobby_main.c: NEW — Lobby entry point (stub).
impact: Files using input.h (input.c, update.c, process_input.c, main.c): No impact — input.h now re-exports input_cmd.h
Files using random: deck.c, contract_logic.c, transmutation_logic.c — now use stdlib rand() instead of raylib
Files using file I/O: json_parse.c — now uses stdio.h standard C file operations
New networking modules: protocol.h/c — added to dependency graph
New binary targets: server_main.c, lobby_main.c — added to dependency graph

change_log.file: src/server/server_net.h, src/server/server_net.c, src/server/server_game.h, src/server/server_game.c, src/net/protocol.h, src/net/protocol.c
change_log.change: Step 6: Server Network Loop implementation. (1) server_net.h: New file — exports server_net_init(), server_net_shutdown(), server_net_listen(), server_net_update() for network management. (2) server_net.c: New file — implements network layer, manages connections, routes InputCmd messages to rooms, builds and broadcasts NetPlayerView state. Depends on room.h, socket.h, protocol.h. (3) server_game.h: Added ServerPassSubstate enum (8 values: IDLE, DEALER_DIR, DEALER_AMT, DEALER_CONFIRM, CONTRACT_DRAFT, CARD_SELECT, EXECUTE, TRANSMUTE), added ServerPlaySubstate enum (6 values: IDLE, WAIT_TURN, TRICK_DONE, ROGUE_WAIT, DUEL_PICK_WAIT, DUEL_GIVE_WAIT), added fields to ServerGame struct: pass_substate, play_substate, draft_round, draft_initialized. Added new function: server_game_apply_cmd(ServerGame *sg, int seat, const InputCmd *cmd) — validates and applies human player commands. Updated @deps-requires to include core/input_cmd.h. (4) server_game.c: Updated to implement server_game_apply_cmd(), refactored state machine logic, added core/input_cmd.h and phase2/phase2_state.h to requires. (5) protocol.h: Added net_input_cmd_to_local() and net_input_cmd_from_local() function declarations for wire format conversion. Updated exports and used_by to include server_net.c. (6) protocol.c: Implemented net_input_cmd_to_local() and net_input_cmd_from_local() to convert between NetInputCmd (wire) and InputCmd (game format).
impact: src/server/server_game.h (new ServerPassSubstate/ServerPlaySubstate enums, new server_game_apply_cmd function, new fields in ServerGame)

change_log.change: Step 8: Command routing logic for network integration. Added #include "net/protocol.h" for net_input_cmd_is_relevant(). Added command routing that uses client_net_state(), client_net_seat(), client_net_send_cmd() from net/client_net.h, net_input_cmd_is_relevant() from net/protocol.h, and input_cmd_pop()/input_cmd_push() from core/input_cmd.h to route InputCmd between local input queue and network.

Step 9: State Receiver for Network Updates. (1) state_recv.h: NEW — Single public function state_recv_apply(GameState *gs, const NetPlayerView *npv) that applies server state updates to local GameState. Requires protocol.h, game_state.h, phase2_state.h. (2) state_recv.c: NEW — Implements state_recv_apply(). Deserializes NetPlayerView (hand cards, trick contents, scores, phase/subphase, Phase2 state: contracts, transmutation inventory, effects, draft state) into GameState and Phase2State. Handles card conversion via net_card_to_game(). Requires protocol.h, game_state.h, hand.h, card.h, trick.h, phase2_state.h, contract.h, transmutation.h, effect.h, string.h. (3) main.c: Added #include "net/state_recv.h". Added state application block in main loop that calls client_net_has_new_state(), client_net_consume_state() to retrieve NetPlayerView, then state_recv_apply(gs, npv) to apply updates to game state.
impact: src/main.c (added dependency on net/state_recv.h, now applies received state updates)
src/net/protocol.h (used_by list updated: state_recv.c was already listed, now has entry)
